title: On Julia's Lips.
content:
Sweet are my Julia's lips and clean,
    As if o'erwashed in Hippocrene.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "On Julia's Lips.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
